form.formComment: Finding that maiden win elusive. Last start 9th (Fr1) over 1609m at this track well beaten by Swan For The Win (1:58.30) in CLCDNW1 on March 26 at $2.10. The run prior 5th (Fr3) over 1609m at this track beaten 18 m by Dj's Midnight (1:57.30) in NW1PM on March 19 at $11.30. Can turn things around in this suitable contest.
